# Pinned dependency snapshot for the allin1 Modal image.
# Generated by:
#   cd plugins/allin1 && uv export --frozen --no-dev --no-emit-project --no-hashes \
#     | grep -v '^-e ' \
#     > ../allin1_remote/modal_worker/requirements.txt
#
# Re-run after every dependency bump in plugins/allin1 so the local
# allin1 plugin and the Modal worker pin the *same* transitive tree.
